name: Mueller Water Products, Inc.
description: Mueller Water Products, Inc. is a leading manufacturer and marketer of products and services used in the transmission, distribution, and measurement of water in North America. The company provides a broad portfolio of water infrastructure products, including valves, fire hydrants, pipe connection and repair products, and metering systems. Through its advanced technology and smart water solutions, such as the Sentryx platform, Mueller helps utilities optimize operations, reduce water loss, and ensure the delivery of safe, clean drinking water to communities across the continent.
